blueprints.name: image_edit
blueprints.title: Image Edit
blueprints.description: Image Edit blueprint

blueprints.name: audio_generation_stable_audio_3_medium
blueprints.title: Audio Generation (Stable Audio 3 Medium)
blueprints.description: Generates music, instrument loops, sound effects, and one-shots from text using Stable Audio 3 Medium, with optional Qwen 3.5 category-based prompt expansion (Music, Instrument, SFX, One-shot).

blueprints.name: audio_generation_stable_audio_3_medium_base
blueprints.title: Audio Generation (Stable Audio 3 Medium Base)
blueprints.description: Generates music, instrument loops, sound effects, and one-shots from text using the Stable Audio 3 Medium base checkpoint, with optional Qwen 3.5 category-based prompt expansion (Music, Instrument, SFX, One-shot).

blueprints.name: text_to_audio_ace_step_1_5
blueprints.title: Text to Audio (ACE-Step 1.5)
blueprints.description: Generates audio/music from text prompts using ACE-Step 1.5, a diffusion-based audio generation model.

blueprints.name: brightness_and_contrast
blueprints.title: Brightness and Contrast
blueprints.description: Adjusts image brightness and contrast using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: chromatic_aberration
blueprints.title: Chromatic Aberration
blueprints.description: Adds lens-style chromatic aberration (color fringing) using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: color_adjustment
blueprints.title: Color Adjustment
blueprints.description: Adjusts saturation, temperature, tint, and vibrance using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: color_balance
blueprints.title: Color Balance
blueprints.description: Balances colors across shadows, midtones, and highlights using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: color_curves
blueprints.title: Color Curves
blueprints.description: Fine-tunes tone and color with per-channel curve adjustments using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: crop_images_2x2
blueprints.title: Crop Images 2x2
blueprints.description: Splits an image into a 2×2 grid of four equal tiles.

blueprints.name: crop_images_3x3
blueprints.title: Crop Images 3x3
blueprints.description: Splits an image into a 3×3 grid of nine equal tiles.

blueprints.name: edge_preserving_blur
blueprints.title: Edge-Preserving Blur
blueprints.description: Applies bilateral (edge-preserving) blur to soften images while retaining detail.

blueprints.name: film_grain
blueprints.title: Film Grain
blueprints.description: Adds procedural film grain texture for a cinematic look via GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: glow
blueprints.title: Glow
blueprints.description: Adds a glow/bloom effect around bright image areas via GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: hue_and_saturation
blueprints.title: Hue and Saturation
blueprints.description: Adjusts hue, saturation, and lightness of an image using a real-time GPU fragment shader.

blueprints.name: image_blur
blueprints.title: Image Blur
blueprints.description: Applies Gaussian, Box, or Radial blur to soften images and create stylized depth or motion effects.

blueprints.name: image_captioning_gemini
blueprints.title: Image Captioning(Gemini)
blueprints.description: Generates descriptive captions for images using Google's Gemini multimodal LLM.

blueprints.name: image_channels
blueprints.title: Image Channels
blueprints.description: Manipulates individual RGBA channels for masking, compositing, and channel effects.

blueprints.name: image_levels
blueprints.title: Image Levels
blueprints.description: Adjusts black point, white point, and gamma for tonal range control via GPU shader.

blueprints.name: remove_background_birefnet
blueprints.title: Remove Background (BiRefNet)
blueprints.description: Removes or replaces image backgrounds using BiRefNet segmentation and alpha compositing.

blueprints.name: sharpen
blueprints.title: Sharpen
blueprints.description: Sharpens image details using a GPU fragment shader for enhanced clarity.

blueprints.name: split_image_grid_to_tiles
blueprints.title: Split Image Grid to Tiles
blueprints.description: Splits an image into a configurable columns×rows grid of equal tiles for tiled generation or processing.

blueprints.name: unsharp_mask
blueprints.title: Unsharp Mask
blueprints.description: Enhances edge contrast via unsharp masking for a sharper image appearance.

blueprints.name: canny_to_image_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Canny to Image (Z-Image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Generates an image from a Canny edge map using Z-Image-Turbo, with text conditioning.

blueprints.name: controlnet_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: ControlNet (Z-Image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Generates images from a text prompt and ControlNet conditioning (e.g. depth, canny) using Z-Image-Turbo.

blueprints.name: depth_to_image_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Depth to Image (Z-Image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Generates an image from a depth map using Z-Image-Turbo with text conditioning.

blueprints.name: image_edit_bernini_r
blueprints.title: Image Edit (Bernini-R)
blueprints.description: Edits a single image using a text prompt, leveraging Bernini-R's latent semantic planning for changes like object addition, removal, or style transfer. Ideal for creative edits requiring precise semantic understanding, such as adding a snowman to a scene or altering an object's appearance.

blueprints.name: image_edit_firered_image_edit_1_1
blueprints.title: Image Edit (FireRed Image Edit 1.1)
blueprints.description: Edits images via text instructions using FireRed Image Edit 1.1, a diffusion-based instruction-following editing model.

blueprints.name: image_edit_flux_2_dev
blueprints.title: Image Edit (Flux.2 Dev)
blueprints.description: Edits an image from text instructions using Flux.2 [dev], with guidance, schedulers, and optional Turbo LoRAs.

blueprints.name: image_edit_flux_2_klein_4b
blueprints.title: Image Edit (Flux.2 Klein 4B)
blueprints.description: Edits an input image via text instructions using FLUX.2 [klein] 4B.

blueprints.name: image_edit_longcat_image_edit
blueprints.title: Image Edit (LongCat Image Edit)
blueprints.description: Edits images via text instructions using LongCat Image Edit, an instruction-following image editing diffusion model.

blueprints.name: image_edit_qwen_2509
blueprints.title: Image Edit (Qwen 2509)
blueprints.description: Edits images from text instructions using Qwen-Image-Edit-2509 with optional Lightning LoRA for few-step sampling.

blueprints.name: image_edit_qwen_2511
blueprints.title: Image Edit (Qwen 2511)
blueprints.description: Edits images via text instructions using Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 with improved character consistency and integrated LoRA.

blueprints.name: image_inpainting_flux_1_fill_dev
blueprints.title: Image Inpainting (Flux.1 Fill Dev)
blueprints.description: Inpaints masked image regions using Flux.1 fill [dev], Black Forest Labs' inpainting/outpainting model.

blueprints.name: image_inpainting_qwen_image
blueprints.title: Image Inpainting (Qwen-image)
blueprints.description: Inpaints masked regions using Qwen-Image, extending its multilingual text rendering to inpainting tasks.

blueprints.name: image_outpainting_qwen_image
blueprints.title: Image Outpainting (Qwen-Image)
blueprints.description: Outpaints beyond image boundaries using Qwen-Image's outpainting capabilities.

blueprints.name: image_to_depth_map_lotus
blueprints.title: Image to Depth Map (Lotus)
blueprints.description: Image to Depth Map (Lotus) blueprint

blueprints.name: image_to_layers_qwen_image_layered
blueprints.title: Image to Layers (Qwen-Image-Layered)
blueprints.description: Decomposes an image into variable-resolution RGBA layers for independent editing using Qwen-Image-Layered.

blueprints.name: image_upscale_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Image Upscale (Z-image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Upscales images to higher resolution using Z-Image-Turbo.

blueprints.name: pose_to_image_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Pose to Image (Z-Image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Generates an image from pose keypoints using Z-Image-Turbo with text conditioning.

blueprints.name: text_to_image
blueprints.title: Text to Image
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Z-Image-Turbo defaults with Qwen3 text encoder and VAE.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_anima
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Anima)
blueprints.description: This subgraph converts text prompts into non-photorealistic illustrations using a 2-billion-parameter model optimized for anime and artistic styles. It is ideal for generating concept art, character designs, or stylized illustrations where photorealism is not required. The model excels with anime and artistic content but performs poorly on realistic subjects.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_anima_base_1_0
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Anima Base 1.0)
blueprints.description: This subgraph generates non-photorealistic illustrations from text prompts using a 2-billion-parameter model optimized for anime concepts, characters, and styles. It is ideal for creating artistic images, concept art, or stylized illustrations where photorealism is not required. The model excels with anime and artistic content but performs poorly on realistic subjects.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_ernie_image
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Ernie Image)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Baidu’s open ERNIE Image (~8B DiT): bilingual in-image typography and layouts (posters, infographics, multi-panel compositions) alongside general scenes, with bundled encoders and VAE.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_ernie_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Ernie Image Turbo)
blueprints.description: Faster ERNIE Image Turbo variant (~8B DiT, distilled for fewer sampling steps): same strengths in Chinese/English on-image text and layout-heavy graphics as the base ERNIE Image lineup, with bundled encoders and VAE.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_flux_1_dev
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Flux.1 Dev)
blueprints.description: Generates images from prompts using FLUX.1 [dev]: a 12B rectified-flow MMDiT with dual CLIP plus T5-XXL text encoders and guidance-distilled sampling for sharp prompt following versus classic DDPM diffusion.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_flux_1_krea_dev
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Flux.1 Krea Dev)
blueprints.description: FLUX.1 Krea [dev] (Black Forest Labs × Krea): open-weight 12B rectified-flow text-to-image drop-in alongside FLUX.1 [dev], tuned away from overcooked saturation toward more natural diversity in people, realism, and style while keeping ecosystem compatibility.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_flux_2_dev
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Flux.2 Dev)
blueprints.description: Generates images from prompts using FLUX.2 [dev]: a newer 32B rectified-flow stack with distilled guidance plus a stronger long-context multimodal encoder for complex scenes, sharper typography/UI text, anatomy, lighting, and high-resolution latent decoding.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_ideogram_v4
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Ideogram v4)
blueprints.description: This subgraph generates images using Ideogram v4, accepting plain text or structured JSON prompts for precise layout and style control. It suits detailed illustrations, concept art, or marketing visuals needing predictable composition and color palettes. The model uses flow-matching with asymmetric guidance, so no negative prompt is needed, but JSON prompts yield the best results.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_netayume_lumina
blueprints.title: Text to Image (NetaYume Lumina)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using NetaYume Lumina, fine-tuned from Neta Lumina for anime-style and illustration generation.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_qwen_image
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Qwen-Image)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Qwen-Image, Alibaba's 20B MMDiT model with excellent multilingual text rendering.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_qwen_image_2512
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Qwen-Image 2512)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Qwen-Image-2512, with enhanced human realism and finer natural detail over the base version.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_z_image_base
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Z-Image-Base)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Z-Image base weights with Qwen3 text encoder and bundled VAE.

blueprints.name: text_to_image_z_image_turbo
blueprints.title: Text to Image (Z-Image-Turbo)
blueprints.description: Generates images from text prompts using Z-Image-Turbo, Alibaba's distilled 6B DiT model.

blueprints.name: canny_to_video_ltx_2_0
blueprints.title: Canny to Video (LTX 2.0)
blueprints.description: Generates video from Canny edge maps using LTX-2, with optional synchronized audio.

blueprints.name: character_replacement_scail_2_base
blueprints.title: Character Replacement (SCAIL-2 Base)
blueprints.description: Replaces a character in a video with a reference image using the SCAIL-2 model for end-to-end controlled animation without intermediate pose maps. Key inputs include a source video, a reference character image, and optional text prompts for style or context. Suitable for animated or live-action footage, multi-character scenes, and creative video editing where direct pose-free animation is needed; works best with moderate-length videos.

blueprints.name: character_replacement_scail_2_extend
blueprints.title: Character Replacement (SCAIL-2 Extend)
blueprints.description: Replaces a character in a video with a reference image using the SCAIL-2 model for end-to-end controlled animation without intermediate pose maps. Key inputs include a source video, a reference character image, and optional text prompts for style or context. Suitable for animated or live-action footage, multi-character scenes, and creative video editing where direct pose-free animation is needed; works best with moderate-length videos.

blueprints.name: depth_to_video_ltx_2_0
blueprints.title: Depth to Video (LTX 2.0)
blueprints.description: Generates depth-controlled video with LTX-2: motion and structure follow a depth-reference video alongside text prompting, optional first-frame image conditioning, with optional synchronized audio.

blueprints.name: first_last_frame_to_video
blueprints.title: First-Last-Frame to Video
blueprints.description: Generates a video that interpolates between the first and last keyframes using LTX-2.3, including optional audio.

blueprints.name: first_last_frame_to_video_ltx_2_3
blueprints.title: First-Last-Frame to Video (LTX-2.3)
blueprints.description: Generates a video interpolating between first and last keyframes using LTX-2.3.

blueprints.name: image_to_video
blueprints.title: Image to Video
blueprints.description: Image to Video blueprint

blueprints.name: image_to_video_ltx_2_3
blueprints.title: Image to Video (LTX-2.3)
blueprints.description: Generates video from a single input image using LTX-2.3.

blueprints.name: image_to_video_wan_2_2
blueprints.title: Image to Video (Wan 2.2)
blueprints.description: Image-to-video with Wan 2.2 using a start image plus text prompt to extend motion from the still frame.

blueprints.name: pose_to_video_ltx_2_0
blueprints.title: Pose to Video (LTX 2.0)
blueprints.description: Generates video from pose reference frames using LTX-2, with optional synchronized audio.

blueprints.name: text_to_video_ltx_2_3
blueprints.title: Text to Video (LTX-2.3)
blueprints.description: Generates video from text prompts using LTX-2.3, Lightricks' video diffusion model.

blueprints.name: text_to_video_wan_2_2
blueprints.title: Text to Video (Wan 2.2)
blueprints.description: Generates video from text prompts using Wan2.2, Alibaba's diffusion video model.

blueprints.name: video_edit_bernini_r
blueprints.title: Video Edit (Bernini-R)
blueprints.description: This subgraph uses Depth Anything 3 to predict spatially consistent geometry from any number of images or video frames, with or without known camera poses. It outputs depth maps, camera poses, and optionally 3D Gaussian parameters for novel view synthesis.

blueprints.name: video_inpaint_void
blueprints.title: Video Inpaint (VOID)
blueprints.description: Removes objects from video by inpainting masked regions using VOID (CogVideoX), with SAM3 text-guided segmentation and optional two-pass optical-flow refinement.

blueprints.name: video_inpaint_wan2_1_vace
blueprints.title: Video Inpaint(Wan2.1 VACE)
blueprints.description: Video Inpaint(Wan2.1 VACE) blueprint

blueprints.name: video_inpainting_wan2_1_vace
blueprints.title: Video Inpainting (Wan2.1 VACE)
blueprints.description: Removes objects from video by inpainting masked regions using Wan 2.1 VACE, with SAM3 text-guided segmentation and optional Lightning LoRA turbo mode.

blueprints.name: video_upscale_gan_x4
blueprints.title: Video Upscale(GAN x4)
blueprints.description: Upscales video to 4× resolution using a GAN-based upscaling model.

blueprints.name: frame_interpolation
blueprints.title: Frame Interpolation
blueprints.description: Increases video frame rate by synthesizing intermediate frames with a frame interpolation model.

blueprints.name: get_any_video_frame
blueprints.title: Get Any Video Frame
blueprints.description: Extracts one image frame from a video at a chosen index, with optional trim and FPS control.

blueprints.name: merge_videos
blueprints.title: Merge Videos
blueprints.description: Concatenates two videos end-to-end with optional resize, letterbox padding, and audio merge or drop.

blueprints.name: video_captioning_gemini
blueprints.title: Video Captioning(Gemini)
blueprints.description: Generates descriptive captions for video input using Google's Gemini multimodal LLM.

blueprints.name: video_stitch
blueprints.title: Video Stitch
blueprints.description: Stitches multiple video clips into a single sequential video file.

blueprints.name: geometry_estimation_moge
blueprints.title: Geometry Estimation (MoGe)
blueprints.description: Estimates 3D scene geometry from an input image using MoGe, outputting a mesh plus OpenGL and DirectX normal maps.

blueprints.name: image_to_gaussian_splat_triposplat
blueprints.title: Image to Gaussian Splat (TripoSplat)
blueprints.description: This subgraph takes a single 2D image as input and generates a variable number of 3D Gaussians (up to 262,144) as output, enabling high-quality 3D reconstruction. It is ideal for asset creation, AR/VR, game development, and simulation environments, handling diverse image styles from photos to illustrations.

blueprints.name: image_to_model_hunyuan3d_2_1
blueprints.title: Image to 3D Model (Hunyuan3d 2.1)
blueprints.description: Generates 3D mesh models from a single input image using Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1.

blueprints.name: image_depth_estimation_depth_anything_3
blueprints.title: Image Depth Estimation (Depth Anything 3)
blueprints.description: This subgraph takes an input image and produces a depth map using the Depth Anything 3 model, which recovers spatially consistent geometry from any number of views. It is ideal for single or multi-view images, videos, and 3D scenes where accurate depth estimation is needed for tasks like SLAM, novel view synthesis, or spatial perception. The model uses a plain transformer backbone and supports both monocular and multi-view inputs without.

blueprints.name: image_depth_estimation_lotus_depth
blueprints.title: Image Depth Estimation (Lotus Depth)
blueprints.description: Estimates a monocular depth map from an input image using the Lotus depth estimation model.

blueprints.name: image_depth_estimation_moge
blueprints.title: Image Depth Estimation (MoGe)
blueprints.description: Estimates monocular depth from an input image using MoGe, outputting both raw and colorized depth maps plus a mask.

blueprints.name: image_face_detection_mediapipe
blueprints.title: Image Face Detection (Mediapipe)
blueprints.description: Detects facial landmarks from an image using MediaPipe, outputting landmark data, face bounding boxes, and an optional face-region mask.

blueprints.name: image_segmentation_sam3
blueprints.title: Image Segmentation (SAM3)
blueprints.description: Segments images into masks using Meta SAM3 from text prompts, points, or boxes.

blueprints.name: image_to_pose_map_sdpose_multi_person
blueprints.title: Image to Pose Map (SDPose Multi-Person)
blueprints.description: Detects multiple people in an image and outputs per-person pose keypoints, skeleton renders, and bounding boxes using SDPose.

blueprints.name: image_to_pose_map_sdpose_ood
blueprints.title: Image to Pose Map (SDPose-OOD)
blueprints.description: Extracts human pose keypoints and stick-figure visuals from an image using SDPose-OOD, with optional bounding-box input per subject.

blueprints.name: video_depth_estimation_depth_anything_3
blueprints.title: Video Depth Estimation (Depth Anything 3)
blueprints.description: This subgraph processes a video input through Depth Anything 3 to produce temporally consistent depth maps for each frame, outputting a depth video. It is ideal for video content requiring spatial geometry estimation, such as 3D reconstruction, SLAM, or novel view synthesis from moving cameras. The model uses a plain transformer backbone trained with a depth-ray representation, supporting any number of views without requiring known camera poses.

blueprints.name: video_depth_estimation_moge
blueprints.title: Video Depth Estimation (MoGe)
blueprints.description: Estimates monocular depth from an input video using MoGe, outputting both raw and colorized depth maps plus a mask.

blueprints.name: video_face_detection_mediapipe
blueprints.title: Video Face Detection (Mediapipe)
blueprints.description: Detects facial landmarks from a video using MediaPipe, outputting landmark data, face bounding boxes, and an optional face-region mask.

blueprints.name: video_segmentation_sam3
blueprints.title: Video Segmentation (SAM3)
blueprints.description: Segments video into temporally consistent masks using Meta SAM3 from text or interactive prompts.

blueprints.name: video_to_pose_map_sdpose_multi_person
blueprints.title: Video to Pose Map (SDPose Multi-Person)
blueprints.description: Extracts multi-person pose keypoints and skeleton frame sequences from video using SDPose with built-in person detection.

blueprints.name: prompt_enhance
blueprints.title: Prompt Enhance
blueprints.description: Expands short text prompts into detailed descriptions using a text generation model for better generation quality.

blueprints.name: select_per_line_text_by_index
blueprints.title: Select Per-Line Text by Index
blueprints.description: Selects one line from multiline text by zero-based index for batch or list-driven prompt workflows.
